name: tribemd-qa-platform
description: Plataforma enterprise de QA automatizado para tribemd.com (BR/US/ES). Foco em defeitos com impacto real ao usuário: i18n, consistência entre locales, links quebrados, regressão visual e exploração automática.

scripts.clean: rimraf allure-results allure-report evidencias reports test-results
scripts.qa:br: QA_LOCALE=br QA_AUTH=1 SKIP_SNAPSHOTS=1 npx playwright test tests/regression tests/visual --project=desktop-chromium; QA_LOCALE=br npx tsx scripts/generate-dashboard.mts; open reports/br/dashboard.html
scripts.qa:us: QA_LOCALE=us QA_AUTH=1 SKIP_SNAPSHOTS=1 npx playwright test tests/regression tests/visual --project=desktop-chromium; QA_LOCALE=us npx tsx scripts/generate-dashboard.mts; open reports/us/dashboard.html
scripts.qa:es: QA_LOCALE=es QA_AUTH=1 SKIP_SNAPSHOTS=1 npx playwright test tests/regression tests/visual --project=desktop-chromium; QA_LOCALE=es npx tsx scripts/generate-dashboard.mts; open reports/es/dashboard.html
scripts.qa:all: QA_LOCALE=br QA_AUTH=1 SKIP_SNAPSHOTS=1 npx playwright test tests/regression tests/visual --project=desktop-chromium; QA_LOCALE=br npx tsx scripts/generate-dashboard.mts; QA_LOCALE=us QA_AUTH=1 SKIP_SNAPSHOTS=1 npx playwright test tests/regression tests/visual --project=desktop-chromium; QA_LOCALE=us npx tsx scripts/generate-dashboard.mts; QA_LOCALE=es QA_AUTH=1 SKIP_SNAPSHOTS=1 npx playwright test tests/regression tests/visual --project=desktop-chromium; QA_LOCALE=es npx tsx scripts/generate-dashboard.mts; npx tsx scripts/generate-unified-dashboard.mts; bash scripts/publish-gh-pages.sh; open https://hstribemd.github.io/tribemd-qa-platform/
